pi_items.source: export_result.sh explicitly checks this path in the EXPECTED_SCREENSHOT variable.
verifier.py checks if the TOP panel is showing the 'Time Series' widget.
verifier.py checks if the BOTTOM panel is showing the 'Accelerometer' widget.
verifier.py checks for 'exactly TWO vertical panels (one top, one bottom)'.
Task description requires starting a 'Synthetic (Cyton)' board session.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring the OpenBCI GUI to a 2-panel layout with the 'Time Series' widget on top and the 'Accelerometer' widget on the bottom, using a Synthetic (Cyton) data source. A screenshot of this exact configuration must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/accel_layout.png'.
